Name: USoundCue
Description: The behavior of audio playback is defined within Sound Cues.

Variables.Name: bOverrideAttenuation
Variables.Description: Indicates whether attenuation should use the Attenuation Overrides or the Attenuation Settings asset

Variables.Name: VolumeMultiplier
Variables.Description: Volume multiplier for the Sound Cue

Variables.Name: PitchMultiplier
Variables.Description: Pitch multiplier for the Sound Cue

Variables.Name: AttenuationOverrides
Variables.Description: Attenuation settings to use if Override Attenuation is set to true
